column4: ⇔ ( σ , j ) ⊧ ϕ 1 ​ or ​ ( σ , j ) ⊧ ϕ 2 \displaystyle\iff(\sigma,j)\models\phi_{1}\text{ or }(\sigma,j)\models\phi_{2}
⇔ ∃ k ≥ j ​ such that ​ ( σ , k ) ⊧ ϕ 2 \displaystyle\iff\exists k\geq j\text{ such that }(\sigma,k)\models\phi_{2}
and ​ ∀ l ∈ [ j , k ) , σ , l ⊧ ϕ 1 \displaystyle\quad\text{ and }\forall l\in[j,k),\sigma,l\models\phi_{1}
⇔ ∀ k ≥ j , ( σ , k ) ⊧ ϕ \displaystyle\iff\forall k\geq j,(\sigma,k)\models\phi
⇔ ∃ k ≥ j , ( σ , k ) ⊧ ϕ \displaystyle\iff\exists k\geq j,(\sigma,k)\models\phi
